surfaces.evidence_source: GitHub repository API, release API, and release page readbacks.
surfaces.label: GitHub
notes: Large normalized Parquet is hosted on Hugging Face and Zenodo, not GitHub.
surfaces.role: Code, documentation, Actions, issues, and lightweight release assets.

surfaces.evidence_source: Hugging Face dataset API and datasets-server viewer readbacks.
surfaces.label: Hugging Face
notes: Viewer health is an explicit audit item and must not be inferred from repository visibility alone.
The dataset is intended to remain public and ungated.
surfaces.role: Canonical normalized document-level Parquet dataset host.

surfaces.evidence_source: DOI redirect, Zenodo record page, and Zenodo record API readbacks.
surfaces.label: Zenodo
notes: Publication evidence should rely on DOI redirect, record HTTP 200, state done, and submitted true.
surfaces.role: Immutable citable archive and DOI-bearing snapshot.

surfaces.evidence_source: Conductor OSF optional mirror policy and public-surface audit evidence.
surfaces.label: OSF
notes: No OSF public surface is currently claimed.
Do not describe OSF as published or complete until policy, checksums, citation wording, and maintenance ownership are approved.
surfaces.role: Optional future mirror or review-bundle host only after a dedicated policy.

surfaces.evidence_source: SOTA metadata packages and RDF linked-data endpoint tracks.
surfaces.label: Future metadata environments
notes: Future metadata surfaces must point back to the same GitHub, Hugging Face, and Zenodo authorities.
Do not claim external metadata publication before validated metadata packages exist.
surfaces.role: Croissant, RO-Crate, Frictionless, DCAT, PROV-O, and other machine-actionable metadata exports.
